title: Graham Hancock: Aliens, Atlantis & the Apocalypse
summary: Graham Hancock discusses his theories about a lost ancient civilization predating conventional historical timelines, the younger Dryas impact theory, psychedelics and their role in human consciousness and early religions, the Ark of the Covenant's possible location in Ethiopia, and speculation about ancient technologies and human abilities that may have been lost.

acronyms.definition: NASA program aimed to prove that humans can deflect asteroids with satellites and prevent Earth impact
A class of antidepressant pharmaceutical drugs
The molecule that carries genetic instructions for the development and functioning of living organisms

events.description: Tunguska event - an air burst over Siberia that flattened 2000 square miles of trees, possibly connected to the Taurid meteor stream
Comet Shoemaker-Levy 9 collided with Jupiter with an impact equivalent to 6 million megatons of TNT
Graham Hancock had a debate with Michael Shermer on The Joe Rogan Experience
Graham Hancock's grandfather Philip Hancock climbed the Great Pyramid on April 5th
Council of Nicaea established the accepted Christian Canon
Graham Hancock published his book Supernatural
Graham Hancock received the plot for his novel Entangled during Ayahuasca sessions in Brazil

key_claims.claim: The younger Dryas impact date almost perfectly coincides with Plato's dates for the destruction of Atlantis (around 9600 BC or 11,600 years ago)
There are approximately 2000 flood myths found around the world documenting a global phenomenon
Francis Crick concluded that DNA could not have evolved on Earth in the time available and proposed directed panspermia
The next 30 years are a danger time as Earth will cross a more dangerous part of the Taurid meteor stream
Early Christianity was a psychedelic religion before the Roman Catholic Church began persecuting competing Christian sects
The Ethiopian Jews (Falasha/Beta Israel) claim their ancestors brought the Ark of the Covenant to Ethiopia from an island in the Nile
Guardians of the Ark in Ethiopia get sick and die rapidly, experiencing burns, cataracts and radiation-like damage
An archaeologist at University of Exeter has identified using lidar what appears to be an enormous pyramid in the Amazon rainforest in Colombia
Fungal DNA is more similar to human DNA than plant DNA
Recent studies show no correlation between serotonin deficiency and depression
